query: SELECT DISTINCT bt.block_id FROM tags_cache tc JOIN block_tags bt ON bt.tag_id = tc.tag_id JOIN blocks b ON b.id = bt.block_id WHERE tc.name LIKE ?1 ESCAPE '\' AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.is_conflict = 0 UNION SELECT DISTINCT btr.source_id AS block_id FROM tags_cache tc JOIN block_tag_refs btr ON btr.tag_id = tc.tag_id JOIN blocks b ON b.id = btr.source_id WHERE tc.name LIKE ?1 ESCAPE '\' AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.is_conflict = 0
